name: research-paper-compilation
description: Compile research findings into a structured academic-style paper with abstract, methodology, findings, and references.

findings.description: Raw research findings, notes, or data to structure

steps.template:
Compile research paper: '{{title}}'
Format: {{format}}
Audience: {{audience}}

Step 1 — Structure the findings:
- Identify thesis/main argument
- Group related findings into sections
- Determine logical flow (chronological, thematic, or argumentative)
- Identify gaps needing additional evidence

Step 2 — Write sections for '{{title}}':

1. Abstract (150-300 words): Problem, approach, key findings, implications
2. Introduction: Context, problem statement, scope
3. Methodology: How information was gathered and evaluated
4. Findings: Organized evidence with analysis
5. Discussion: Interpretation, limitations, implications
6. Conclusion: Summary, recommendations, future work
7. References: Properly formatted citations

Source material:
{{findings}}

Step 3 — Quality review:
- Verify all claims have citations
- Check logical consistency between sections
- Ensure abstract accurately reflects content
- Validate reference formatting
- Review for appropriate tone given audience: {{audience}}
